entity.summary: Ethereum prop-AMM decentralized exchange with substantial current spot-swap volume tracked across recent daily, weekly, and monthly windows.
entity.notes: Current registry metrics show substantial non-zero 30-day, 7-day, and 24-hour Ethereum DEX volume. A stable first-party public website was not recovered in this review pass, so URL fields remain unset and confidence is medium.

evidence.title: FermiSwap volume metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Registry identifies FermiSwap as an Ethereum prop AMM and reports substantial non-zero 30-day, 7-day, and 24-hour DEX volume.

evidence.title: FermiSwap DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently identifies FermiSwap as an Ethereum decentralized exchange.

evidence.title: FermiSwap open-source volume adapter
evidence.notes: Open-source DEX-volume adapter repository provides the implementation basis for the current FermiSwap volume series used for status corroboration.
